text: Until I can reach the sky,
I believe, until the next tomorrow, hey
Chasing and being chased on top of Mobius' ring.
Getting closer and facing forward, hey I want to share your style.
It begins, it expands, this flavor that exceeds imagination
I feel so good throughout my body, I will become free, oh yeah
Share the music, even if it's far.
Share the one dream, by telling each other.
Share the good times and laugh.
I'll keep going until I can reach the sky.
Let's overcome it now, I believe in the next tomorrow yeah yeah...
You were waiting there on the other side of the invisible wall.
I'll be there soon, I believe in one world yeah yeah...
{\fad(1000,0)}Adventure on the Archipelago\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\N\Nof Dancing Soap Bubbles

name: Camie
text: Hacchin's takoyaki is the best in the world, isn't it?

name: Sanji
text: How does he bring out the taste of the sauce like this?

name: Usopp
text: There's just something great about a food stall at sea, huh?

name: Brook
text: This is the first time I have ever eaten takoyaki.

name: Brook
text: It feels like my stomach is going to burst...

name: Hachi
text: Eat as much as you like, it's free today!

name: Hachi
text: It's our way of thanking you for saving us!

name: Camie
text: These have Dashi in them, and these have Mochi.

name: Nami
text: It's not like I'll forgive you just because of this, you know.

name: Hachi
text: I just wanted to know what you think, honestly!

name: Hachi
text: Feel free to eat as much as you want!

name: Duval
text: Don't leave without giving us a chance to thank you!

name: Luffy
text: Was that how his face looked...?

name: Sanji
text: He shouldn't have anything to complain about now, right?

name: Duval
text: After you smashed my face in, we were all really surprised when I woke up!

name: Duval
text: I can't even recognize myself any more!

name: Duval
text: Now, the ladies will be crazy for me.

name: Duval
text: It truly is a rosy life!

name: Duval
text: I want to go back to my lazy country-life as soon as possible...

name: Duval
text: But if I left without showing my thanks to you, I could never forgive myself!

name: Duval
text: This is your first time visiting these parts, right?

name: Duval
text: If there's anything we can help you with, just call us!

name: Sanji
text: Don't wink if you're not used to it!

name: Sanji
text: Well, as long as you're satisfied, that's good enough.

name: Sanji
text: If you wanna do us a favor, then don't bother us again...

name: Duval
text: I want to ride on a white horse...

name: Sanji
text: I never said a single word about that!

name: Duval
text: It is somewhat embarrassing, but... I accept it!

name: Nami
text: I wasn't doing anything like that!

name: Nami
text: I was just wiping off the takoyaki!

name: Nami
text: What's with that ridiculously positive attitude of yours?!

name: Duval
text: Am I the most handsome man in the world?

name: Riders
text: You're only giving it one choice?!

name: Usopp
text: We get that you're handsome, but you're still an idiot.

name: Luffy
text: You're no match against his craziness!

name: Duval
text: This is my snail phone number.

name: Duval
text: Feel free to call me whenever you like!

name: Duval
text: I'll definitely help you out when that time comes!

name: Duval
text: I really did cause you a lot of trouble, huh?

name: Brook
text: This is the first time I have eaten takoyaki..

name: Hachi
text: As expected of the Straw Hat crew...

name: Hachi
text: I wish I had six more arms.

name: Sanji
text: If you want a break, then come up to the deck.

name: Sanji
text: I'll give you a cup of tea.

name: Camie
text: This is the course we're gonna take.

name: Camie
text: We're headed for the Sabaody Archipelago.

name: Usopp
text: We can't get to Fishman Island without going there first?

name: Hachi
text: We Fishmen and merfolk can just dive straight down to go back.

name: Hachi
text: But you're humans, so if you tried to dive down there, the pressure would kill you!

name: Franky
text: The submarine couldn't reach it either.

name: Pappag
text: It seems like you don't know anything...

name: Pappag
text: So I'll tell you a thing or two about these seas!

name: Pappag
text: To start with, there are actually two routes you can take to reach the New World!

name: Pappag
text: But only one of them is accessible for outlaws, like yourselves!

name: Pappag
text: One requires the World Government's permission,

name: Pappag
text: for you to cross the Red Line by going over the top,

name: Pappag
text: through the Holy Land Mariejoa at its summit!

name: Pappag
text: Of course, there's no way a pirate would be allowed to pass through like that.

name: Chopper
text: You mean, walking over the Red Line?

name: Chopper
text: Then what would we do about the ship?

name: Pappag
text: You'd have to leave the ship behind, and get a new one on the other side.

name: Pappag
text: Getting permission takes both time and money, but it's the safest way to get there.

name: Pappag
text: The passage you're taking will allow you to get through with your ship and everything!

name: Pappag
text: The Ocean-floor Route, which goes straight by Fishman Island!

name: Camie
text: But the Ocean-floor Route is pretty dangerous as well.

name: Pappag
text: I didn't say you could take over...

name: Camie
text: There are plenty of people who are eaten, along with their ships, by sea-monsters and Sea Kings.

name: Chopper
text: I don't want to go to Fishman Island after all...

name: Nami
text: Did you just say "along with their ships"?

name: Nami
text: What kind of ship can we use to travel on the ocean-floor?

name: Franky
text: Hey, this ship can't travel under water!

name: Camie
text: You see, inside of that huge wall, that circles the whole globe, the Red Line...

name: Camie
text: there's a small hole in a certain spot.

name: Camie
text: Although from our perspective, it's a huge hole.

name: Camie
text: And that's where Fishman Island is!

name: Hachi
text: Actually, it's right underneath the Holy Land, Mariejoa!

name: Hachi
text: You just head about ten thousand meters down, and there it is!

name: Nami
text: Wasn't Sky Island about ten thousand meters up in the sky, too?

name: Franky
text: What do you mean, we're going to take this ship to the ocean-floor?

name: Camie
text: We're going to get the ship coated at the island we're going to now.

name: Luffy
text: There's tons of soap-bubbles floating around!

name: Usopp
text: They just keep floating up, one after another...

name: Camie
text: They're rising up from the island.

name: Usopp
text: Just saying that they're rising doesn't really help...

name: Robin
text: Sorry for interrupting, but is the Log Pose alright?

name: Nami
text: It's still pointing to Fishman Island, but...

name: Nami
text: Say, won't this island cause it to change its course?

name: Hachi
text: You don't have to worry about that.

name: Hachi
text: The Sabaody Archipelago is just a lot of trees.

name: Hachi
text: Have you ever heard of mangrove trees?

name: Sanji
text: You mean trees with roots in the ocean that sink and emerge with the tides, right?

name: Hachi
text: Although the mangroves here never sink.

name: Hachi
text: The Sabaody Archipelago is the largest mangrove in the world.

name: Hachi
text: They call the trees here the Yarukiman Mangroves.

name: *Translator's note
text: {\fad(200,200)}"Yaru ki manman": To be pumped up.

name: Luffy
text: Yeah, they sure look like they're excited!

name: Hachi
text: In all, there are 79 trees, and all of them are like small islands.

name: Hachi
text: There are towns or other structures on each one.

name: Hachi
text: All of the islands together are known as the Sabaody Archipelago.

name: Hachi
text: The closest grove, grove 44, is the civilian entrance, so let's take the ship a little closer.

name: Luffy
text: Now that we're seeing them up-close, those roots really are huge, huh?

name: Hachi
text: That's how each of the islands are connected.

name: Hachi
text: This is where we're dropping anchor.

name: Luffy
text: I'm setting foot on it first!

name: Hachi
text: Alright everyone, don't forget the number here!

name: Hachi
text: All of the islands are connected via bridges...

name: Hachi
text: So if you remember the number, you won't get lost.

name: Usopp
text: Even then, there is one guy who'll get lost, right?

name: Luffy
text: One popped out from the ground!

name: Pappag
text: The roots of these Yarukiman Mangroves... secrete a unique kind of resin.

name: Pappag
text: So, when the trees "breathe out", the resin {gets}is blown out as well, and forms these soap-bubbles.

name: Chopper
text: So that's why they're all floating into the sky?

name: Usopp
text: So all of this is actually natural?

name: Usopp
text: When did you get up there?!

name: Luffy
text: I can see an amusement park over there!

name: Camie
text: Riding on that is my dream.

name: Chopper
text: I want to ride it too, but I guess I can't...

name: Nami
text: What's our goal on this island?

name: Nami
text: You said something about coating for the ship earlier, didn't you?

name: Hachi
text: We have to find a coating mechanic, and have him coat your ship with this resin!

name: Hachi
text: Simply put, that will enable your ship to travel under the sea!

name: Hachi
text: That's the only way humans can reach Fishman Island.

name: Hachi
text: However, if you get an amateur to do it...

name: Hachi
text: The ship, and the humans riding it, would be crushed by the water-pressure.

name: Hachi
text: I know one mechanic who's trustworthy, so I'm gonna take you to him.

name: Brook
text: Octopus-san, you are such a nice fellow for helping us so much...

name: Brook
text: Ah, he is a nice octopus!

name: Hachi
text: I'd like you to make just a single promise to me.

name: Hachi
text: Once we enter the city, we might run into the World Nobles walking around there.

name: Robin
text: The citizens of the Holy Land, Mariejoa.

name: Hachi
text: No matter what might happen in the city...

name: Hachi
text: I want you to promise that you won't lay a hand on the World Nobles!

name: Hachi
text: Even if someone were to be killed...

name: Hachi
text: Just pretend you didn't see anything!

name: Franky
text: We used up all our cola in that battle back there.

name: Franky
text: Taking care of the ship is my job!

name: Usopp
text: Of course, I wanted to help out as well!

name: Usopp
text: Once we're done, let's head out, all three of us.

name: Sanji
text: I can't leave the ship before someone comes back.

name: Nami
text: We've got tons of treasure stored on the ship right now...

name: Nami
text: Is there a knight around who would safeguard it?

name: Usopp
text: You really do anything Nami wants you to, huh?

name: Sanji
text: I am a slave of love!

name: Usopp
text: There's no point if you admit it yourself...

name: Usopp and Sanji
text: Where are you going, all by yourself?

name: Sanji
text: This is an Archipelago, you know?!

name: Sanji
text: We won't be able to find you!

name: Zoro
text: Who'd get lost on an island like this, where it's so easy to find your way?

name: Zoro
text: Each of the trees have a number on them, right?

name: Zoro
text: Even a kid with the worst sense of direction would be able to find his way!

name: Usopp
text: Don't forget to ask for directions!

name: Zoro
text: As long as I don't forget the number on this tree...

name: Hachi
text: The World Nobles are also known as the Celestial Dragons.

name: Hachi
text: They're really arrogant, and wear a mask so they don't have to breathe the same air as everyone else.

name: Hachi
text: No matter what, don't try to oppose those guys.

name: Hachi
text: I need you to promise that!

name: Hachi
text: And there are several other things to look out for.

name: Hachi
text: Like I said earlier, this island is where everyone who wants to go to the New World, gathers.

name: Hachi
text: There are plenty of big-name pirates like yourselves...

name: Hachi
text: And then there are marines and bounty-hunters trying to catch them.

name: Hachi
text: Even if pirates are taken away by slave-traders, the law won't protect them.

name: Hachi
text: If you do anything to get yourselves noticed, they'll go after you instantly, so be careful!

name: Hachi
text: The marines around here are not to be taken lightly.

name: Hachi
text: These waters are close to the Navy HQ, after all.

name: Hachi
text: All the bounty-hunters around here are on a totally different level as well!

name: Hachi
text: Camie and I are not a mermaid and a fishman, okay?

name: Hachi
text: While we're here, please pretend that we're ordinary people.

name: Robin
text: We should follow the customs of the culture around here, Luffy.

name: Robin
text: Let's just do as the octopus told us to.

name: Luffy
text: None of the air is coming out, either!

name: Person
text: Is that about the right height?

name: Person
text: Now you can drive around with it.

name: Person
text: Aren't they convenient, the Sabaody Archipelago's exclusive Bubble Bike?

name: Person
text: If you want to rent it, it's 500 Belly per person.

name: Person
text: If you want to buy it, it's 1,000 Belly!

name: Luffy
text: I'm gonna buy it with my spending money!

name: Hachi
text: There's no point in buying it, just rent one.

name: Luffy
text: Why should you get to decide that?

name: Hachi
text: Uh, I'll tell you the reason later.

name: Hachi
text: We'll rent two more of them.

name: Person
text: Oh, you're a local, huh? That's too bad...

name: Luffy
text: I'm definitely buying one of these Bubble bikes!

name: Hachi
text: You rode the soap bubbles into the sky when we first got here, right?

name: Luffy
text: Oh, well, when I reached the top of the trees, I thought I'd go even higher...

name: Luffy
text: But then all the soap bubbles around me suddenly started popping...

name: Luffy
text: And then the one I was riding did, too...

name: Hachi
text: That's because you left the Sabaody Archipelago's unique atmosphere.

name: Hachi
text: This place has a special, unique climate specifically suited to the Yarukiman Mangroves.

name: Hachi
text: But once you leave that climate, the soap bubbles won't be strong enough to stay whole.

name: Robin
text: Then, that means that you can only ride the soap bubbles...

name: Robin
text: for as long as you stay on the island, doesn't it?

name: Hachi
text: People who come here for the first time often buy a Bubble bike...

name: Luffy
text: No, I think I'll buy one!

name: Luffy
text: I don't accept that explanation at all...

name: Nami
text: You don't get it, do you?

name: Nami
text: In short, once you leave the island, the soap bubbles will break.

name: Luffy
text: Why didn't you say so right away?!

name: Camie
text: Ah, but Luffy-chin, you can use them at Fishman Island.

name: Camie
text: We've got soap bubbles on the ocean floor too.

name: Luffy
text: I wanna go to Fishman Island soon~

name: Luffy
text: I'm really looking forward to it~

name: Pappag
text: In that case, you should meet the mermaid princess!

name: Pappag
text: She's so beautiful, I can't even describe it!

name: Pappag
text: I can't look away from her myself!

name: Brook
text: I will be looking forward to that!

name: Brook
text: I have a good eye for beauties...

name: Brook
text: Though being a skeleton, I do not have eyes.

name: Person
text: Would you like to taste some?

name: Person
text: You can see that it's got "Grand Line First Half" written on it, right?

name: Person
text: The idea is to take them into the New World as a souvenir of sorts.

name: Person
text: They'll last for about three months, so don't worry about it!

name: Robin
text: There are lots of hotels here, aren't there?

name: Hachi
text: It's the living quarters for those waiting for permission to pass through Mariejoa.

name: Pappag
text: It's really easy to make these hotels...

name: Pappag
text: They just coat those huge soap bubbles in a special alloy, and the foundation is done.

name: Pappag
text: That's how they make those round buildings.

name: Camie
text: You bought a lot of them, huh?

name: Hachi
text: Carrying that around everywhere should be a problem...

name: Hachi
text: Put them in the Bubble bag.

name: Luffy
text: You don't need to put in any effort to carry your luggage on this island, huh?

name: Chopper
text: Where did Nami and Robin go?

name: Camie
text: They went to the shopping mall in Grove 30.

name: Camie
text: They said they'd leave the coating of the ship to us.

name: Robin
text: Even though we invited her, Camie-chan wouldn't come with us...

name: Nami
text: She's seemed more reserved ever since we arrived on this island...

name: Robin
text: Perhaps there is some sort of bad history on this island...?

name: Hachi
text: There's still a long way to go!

name: Chopper
text: How did this turn into a race?

name: Man
text: I'm asking you a favor here!

name: Man
text: I just want to get this off my neck!

name: Man
text: I've given up on going to the New World!

name: Man
text: I've got a wife and a child back home!

name: Man
text: Last time I saw my kid, he was still a baby...

name: Man
text: He still doesn't even know what I look like!

name: Hachi
text: He's probably a pirate who was caught by kidnappers and sold as a slave...

name: Hachi
text: His owner probably brought him to this island, and he made a run for it!

name: Hachi
text: Even though he should know that he can't escape!

name: Man
text: If I could just get this off my neck!

name: Hachi
text: Slaves always have those chains attached to their necks...

name: Hachi
text: If they try to take them off or run away, they'll explode!

name: Man
text: Just let me buy some souvenirs and go home...

name: Man
text: I've given up on being a pirate...

name: People
text: It's a slave who tried to run away!

name: Pappag
text: You promised to not get involved, no matter what, right?!

name: Camie
text: Hacchin, what are we going to do?!

name: Hachi
text: Get out of the Bubble bike!

name: Hachi
text: Just hurry up and do it!

name: Hachi
text: You have to bow down too!

name: Hachi
text: No matter what, don't look them in the eyes!

name: Lady
text: Yet another one has been broken.

name: World Noble
text: Did you make sure to give him his tranquilizer every day?

name: Lady
text: However, it appears that it does not work on fools...

name: Lady
text: Would you please buy me a new one?

name: World Noble
text: Your disciplining skills are truly terrible.

name: World Noble
text: You keep destroying my captain collection, one after another...

name: Lady
text: A grown man always crying about family this, family that...

name: Lady
text: You are just a mere human!

name: Luffy
text: He can't even move any more!

name: Lady
text: I would like a giant slave next.

name: World Noble
text: You should start with a human child.

name: Hachi
text: First off, we should get away from here!

name: Brook
text: It will help you calm down.

name: Luffy
text: Do you think that guy will be alright?

name: Hachi
text: He's a pirate, so even if they save him, he'll just be sent to prison.

name: Chopper
text: That pirate should be able to beat that old guy and the woman, right?

name: Pappag
text: If you hurt one of the Celestial Dragons...

name: Pappag
text: An admiral from Navy HQ and a fleet of battle ships will come here.

name: Pappag
text: It could be Akainu or Kizaru...

name: Pappag
text: There's no way to know who'd show up.

name: Pappag
text: The HQ is right next to us, after all.

name: Chopper
text: What makes those guys so special?!

name: Pappag
text: Those guys are descendants of the creators!

name: Pappag
text: 800 years ago, a group of 20 kings formed the organization known as the World Government.

name: Pappag
text: The Celestial Dragons are their descendants.

name: Pappag
text: And over the course of the years...

name: Pappag
text: They've come to abuse their incredible influence.
